title: begonia repens
intro: Begonia repens is a low-growing, spreading, and semi-succulent plant species, native to the tropical regions of Southeast Asia. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Begonia repens include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture for its herbal use, with the leaves being the primary part used for medicinal purposes.
